title: Format a Time String
scenario: Write a prompt that takes a time string in the format 'HH:mm:ss' and formats it into the format 'HH:mm:ss AM/PM'. The input time string may be in different formats (e.g., 'HH:mm', 'HH:mm:ss', 'HH:mm:ss AM/PM'). The output should be the formatted time string.
constraints: Must be under 15 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The code should be syntactically correct and valid JavaScript code.
The code should adhere to the constraints provided (JavaScript solution and under 15 lines of code).
The code should correctly format the time string into the required format.
